= w:en:User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/SkinSwitcher =
{{ombox
 |small=yes
 |type=content
 |text=This is the documentation page for the [[User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/SkinSwitcher.js]] user script, which was forked from [[User:Eizen/SkinSwitcher.js]]. '''[[User:Macaw*/Vector 2022 Skin Switcher.js]]''' is a fork of this script that also includes Vector{{nbsp}}2022.}}

{{infobox Wikipedia user script
 | name = SkinSwitcher
 | desc = Allows for easy switching between MediaWiki's default skins
 | author = [[User:Eizen|Eizen]] <br/> [[User:ClaudineChionh|ClaudineChionh]]
 | updated = {{start date and age|2021|11|06}}
 | status = Obsolete
 | version = 0.2.0
 | source = [[User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/SkinSwitcher.js]]
 | skins = Vector 2010<br /> Timeless<br/> MonoBook<br /> ApiOutput
 | browsers = Developed in [[Google Chrome]]
}}

'''SkinSwitcher''' is a [[JavaScript]] [[Wikipedia:User scripts|user script]] that allows users to view a given page in MediaWiki's default skins. {{As of|2021|11|06}}, these were Vector (2010), Timeless, MonoBook, and ApiOutput.

An options menu/toolbox/toolbar is provided in each skin to make skin switching convenient and easy. For Vector, Timeless, and MonoBook, a toolbox is provided below "Tools" on the left-hand side of the screen, and for ApiOutput, an experimental toolbar is provided across the top of the {{mono|body}} of the page.

This script has not been updated since 2021. '''[[User:Macaw*/Vector 2022 Skin Switcher.js]]''' is a fork of this script that also includes Vector{{nbsp}}2022, the default skin {{as of|2025|lc=yes}}.
